name: 3P Learning Limited..
analysis: 3PL's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 57% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (3.9× the 20-day average) — real participation. Trade idea: entry A$0.3000, stop A$0.2623, target A$0.3600 (1.59:1) — then trail it.
